query: Gran Fondo Jordan gran fondo cycling Dead Sea

videos.title: Gran Fondo Dead Sea in 14 minutes
videos.description:
An on board video from the participation of Cycle Ride magazine in  the third edition of Grand Fondo Dead Sea. 
From the grouppetto to the tête de la Course, every highlight of the event is here.

videos.title: Do I Win The GRAN FONDO DEAD SEA!? | Tour of Arad | Stage 2
videos.description:
In the Tour of Arad 2017 I race on the same route as the Gran Fondo Dead Sea Israel. After the two elite stages yesterday, my gap on GC-leader Omer Goldstein is around one minute. The famous Israeli Scorpion’s Climb will definitely be the decisive part in today’s race. Can I win stage 2 - and maybe even the General Classification - in the Tour of Arad? 
---
In-car footage: Aviad Izrael / Israel Cycling Academy
Thumbnail picture: Anat Cherpak 
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

videos.title: Gran Fondo Dead Sea Arad Cycling Festival 23-24 march 2018
videos.description:
The International Gran Fondo Dead Sea Arad Cycling Festival 2018, 
http://www.granfondo-deadsea.com
one of the largest and most unique road cycling festivals in the Middle East will take place on the 23rd and 24th of March. 
ההרשמה למירוץ ה- GRAN FONDO ARAD-DEAD SEA 2018
נפתחה וכבר מאות רוכבים ורוכבות הבטיחו את מקומם גם השנה בין התאריכים 23- 24/3   
 לינק הרשמה ופרטי כל המקצים באתר :
http://www.granfondo-deadsea.co.il
